hero.name: Jaeho Kim
hero.title: Security Infrastructure Engineer
hero.subtitle: An engineer growing toward building stable and secure infrastructure environments.

about.heading: About
about.description_1: Building on a foundation in OS (NOS) and Cisco networking developed since high school, I gained broad hands-on experience at an infrastructure team — from On-Prem server management to multi-cloud operations.
about.description_2: I am now growing toward becoming a security engineer who understands enterprise security across service, operations, and development — steadily expanding my knowledge through consistent learning.
about.description_3: My goal is to build security environments that are stable and trusted.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description:
I am interested in information security activities, education, and undergraduate internship opportunities.
Feel free to reach out anytime.
